guidelines: Scanners must stay non-destructive: no data exfiltration, RCE execution, data modification, or DoS — confirmation/PoC only.
Any new check should add a matching assertion to test/integration.mjs.
Match the existing code style: concise, commented intent, no new heavy dependencies without reason.
Never log or expose user-supplied credentials; redact them in reproduction output.
Keep findings actionable: severity, evidence, and a concrete remediation.

pathInstructions.instructions: Verify probes are bounded (timeouts, caps) and safe by default; flag any request that could mutate remote state.
Pin actions to valid version tags; ensure secret-gated jobs skip cleanly when the secret is absent.
Frontend is presentation-only; check for XSS via innerHTML and ensure findings are rendered with textContent.
